title: Crystal Models
description: Replaces End Crystals with cool models for fabric. you can use almost any model you want!
body:
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow) [![Source](https://img.shields.io/badge/Source-181717?logo=github&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/cutebow/Crystal-Anchor-Models)
--- Crystal Models lets you swap vanilla end crystals for your own OBJ models, with per-entity scale, offset, and rotation, optional hover and true 3D spin, optional dual crystal models, built-in performance controls. To add models, place your OBJ and its texture PNGs in config/crystal_models/models. Keep the OBJ and textures together; matching base names is safest. Open the mod’s settings to trigger a rescan, or restart the game. Models shipped inside the mod still work too, so you can mix your own with the built-ins. (keep in mind theres a process to making the models work. you can request models to me as well and i can convert it to work with the mod it has to be .glb or .gltf for a starting point) ofc if you're smart enough to figure out how to add you're own your welcome to do so Want more models or help? Join the Discord! [![Follow me!](https://img.shields.io/badge/Follow%20me!-💕-pink?style=flat)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow) [![NameMC](https://img.shields.io/badge/namemc-cutebow-ffb6c1?style=flat&logo=minecraft&logoColor=white)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow)
